'''鈭歞h-r-s''' ('''kadharas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:likeness|likeness]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:likeness|likeness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-r-s
|-
! Lemma
| kadharas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidharas|thidharas]] || [[word:jidharas|jidharas]] || [[word:shidharas|shidharas]] || [[word:kidharas|kidharas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudharas|thuthudharas]] || [[word:jujudharas|jujudharas]] || [[word:shushudharas|shushudharas]] || [[word:kukudharas|kukudharas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudharas|thudharas]] || [[word:judharas|judharas]] || [[word:shudharas|shudharas]] || [[word:kudharas|kudharas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudharas|thudharas]] || [[word:judharas|judharas]] || [[word:shudharas|shudharas]] || [[word:kudharas|kudharas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedharas|thedharas]] || [[word:jedharas|jedharas]] || [[word:shedharas|shedharas]] || [[word:kedharas|kedharas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodharas|thothodharas]] || [[word:jojodharas|jojodharas]] || [[word:shoshodharas|shoshodharas]] || [[word:kokodharas|kokodharas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodharas|thodharas]] || [[word:jodharas|jodharas]] || [[word:shodharas|shodharas]] || [[word:kodharas|kodharas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodharas|thodharas]] || [[word:jodharas|jodharas]] || [[word:shodharas|shodharas]] || [[word:kodharas|kodharas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]] || [[word:dharas|dharas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dharas|th忙dharas]] || [[word:j忙dharas|j忙dharas]] || [[word:sh忙dharas|sh忙dharas]] || [[word:k忙dharas|k忙dharas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadharas|thathadharas]] || [[word:jajadharas|jajadharas]] || [[word:shashadharas|shashadharas]] || [[word:kakadharas|kakadharas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadharas|thadharas]] || [[word:jadharas|jadharas]] || [[word:shadharas|shadharas]] || [[word:kadharas|kadharas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadharas|thadharas]] || [[word:jadharas|jadharas]] || [[word:shadharas|shadharas]] || [[word:kadharas|kadharas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadharas|shadharas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadharas|goshadharas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadharas|gokishadharas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadharasn眉|shadharasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadharasnkn眉|goshadharasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadharasn眉|gokishadharasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadharassh毛|shadharassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadharasnksh毛|goshadharasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadharassh毛|gokishadharassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadharasro|shadharasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadharasnkro|goshadharasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadharasro|gokishadharasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadharasmu|shadharasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadharasnkmu|goshadharasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadharasmu|gokishadharasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadharassher|shadharassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadharasnksher|goshadharasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadharassher|gokishadharassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadharasng|shadharasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadharasnkng|goshadharasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadharasng|gokishadharasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadharasya|shadharasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadharasnkya|goshadharasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadharasya|gokishadharasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadharasyam|shadharasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadharasnkyam|goshadharasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadharasyam|gokishadharasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadharasn眉sh毛|shadharasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadharasnkn眉sh毛|goshadharasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadharasn眉sh毛|gokishadharasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadharasn眉ro|shadharasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadharasnkn眉ro|goshadharasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadharasn眉ro|gokishadharasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadharasn眉mu|shadharasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadharasnkn眉mu|goshadharasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadharasn眉mu|gokishadharasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadharassh毛n眉|shadharassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadharasnksh毛n眉|goshadharasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadharassh毛n眉|gokishadharassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadharassh毛ro|shadharassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadharasnksh毛ro|goshadharasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadharassh毛ro|gokishadharassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadharassh毛mu|shadharassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadharasnksh毛mu|goshadharasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadharassh毛mu|gokishadharassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadharasron眉|shadharasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadharasnkron眉|goshadharasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadharasron眉|gokishadharasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadharasrosh毛|shadharasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadharasnkrosh毛|goshadharasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadharasrosh毛|gokishadharasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadharasromu|shadharasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadharasnkromu|goshadharasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadharasromu|gokishadharasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadharasmun眉|shadharasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadharasnkmun眉|goshadharasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadharasmun眉|gokishadharasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadharasmush毛|shadharasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadharasnkmush毛|goshadharasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadharasmush毛|gokishadharasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadharasmuro|shadharasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadharasnkmuro|goshadharasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadharasmuro|gokishadharasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
